question: What major developments occurred in the 2026 French municipal elections during mid-March?
answer: the first-round results of the 2026 French municipal elections, which saw the far-right National Rally gain ground in southeastern cities and set up high-stakes runoffs in major urban centers including Paris, where Socialist Emmanuel Grégoire led conservative Rachida Dati ahead of the March 22 runoff
market_question: Will Emmanuel Grégoire win the Paris mayor election?
